title: [AI5] Optimize Web Pages for Agent Data Extraction and Understanding
summary: Added an agent-readable truth layer to the frontend router shell. Every route now exposes JSON-LD, a stable application/json data island, and a deterministic DOM section containing TNF product identity, functional benefits, route context, host mode, canonical URL, and extraction contract identifiers.

verification.command: pnpm --dir apps/frontend exec tsc --ignoreConfig --noEmit --jsx react-jsx --target ES2022 --module ESNext --moduleResolution bundler --skipLibCheck --esModuleInterop --allowSyntheticDefaultImports --strict src/components/AgentTruthLayer.tsx

verification.notes: Full frontend type-check remained active without output for an extended interval and was terminated to keep the autonomous loop moving. No TypeScript errors were emitted before termination.
